FocusFlow

Smart Pomodoro Task Tracker

Boost your productivity with AI-powered task management, real-time collaboration, and intelligent focus sessions.

Features

🍅 Pomodoro Timer

Enhanced focus timer with database sync and team visibility

🤖 AI Assistant

Generate tasks intelligently with AI-powered recommendations

👥 Team Collaboration

Work together with real-time sync and shared workspaces

📊 Analytics

Track your productivity with detailed charts and insights

🔐 Secure Auth

Email/password and Google OAuth authentication

⚡ Fast & Modern

Built with Next.js 15 and modern best practices

© 2024 FocusFlow. Built with Next.js + Supabase.
